summary: CompactHandoffRendererTest passes (17/17), but Task 2.1 introduced 3 new downstream regressions and broke JS/Kotlin parity. Renderer now emits a 'candidates:' block in place of the 'src? ' line, yet the FeedbackQueueFormatter tests, the parity fixture, and the JS console renderer were not updated. Total :fixthis-mcp:test = 5 failures (baseline 2 + 3 new).

results.details: 17 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors (TEST-...CompactHandoffRendererTest.xml). Includes the 2 new tests: renderEmitsCandidatesBlockWithCandidateLines, renderEmitsCandidatesUnknownWhenEmpty.

301 tests completed, 5 failed. Baseline expected 2 failures (the FeedbackConsoleServerTest pair at lines 629, 1905). 3 NEW failures attributable to Task 2.1: FeedbackQueueFormatterTest.compactMarkdownEmitsSrcUnknownWhenNoSourceCandidates (line 542), FeedbackQueueFormatterTest.compactMarkdownEmitsCompactSourceTokenLine (line 496), PromptParityTest.jsAndKotlinCompactPromptsMatchExpectedFixture (line 28).

issues: FeedbackQueueFormatterTest.kt:542 still asserts markdown.contains("src? unknown"). FeedbackQueueFormatter.toMarkdown for COMPACT mode delegates to CompactHandoffRenderer.render (FeedbackQueueFormatter.kt:45), so the format change propagated to it but the assertion was not updated to expect '~ unknown' under '  candidates:'.

FeedbackQueueFormatterTest.kt:496 (compactMarkdownEmitsCompactSourceTokenLine) expects the old 'src? <file>:<line> <conf>; why=...' single-line token form. Same root cause — assertion not updated to the new candidates block.

PromptParityTest fixture fixthis-mcp/src/test/resources/parity/expected-prompt.txt line 12 still contains 'src? AppPrimaryButton.kt:42 high; why=tag+compTag'. Fixture must be regenerated/updated to the new candidates: block format.

JS/Kotlin parity is broken: fixthis-mcp/src/main/resources/console/app.js:1850 still emits `'src? ' + location + ' ' + confidence` while Kotlin now emits the 'candidates:' block. This is the actual driver of the PromptParityTest failure regardless of whether the fixture is updated — the JS-side compact renderer must produce the same candidates block, otherwise jsAndKotlinCompactPromptsMatchExpectedFixture cannot pass for any fixture.

Dead code: CompactHandoffRenderer.kt:116-125 (compactSourceLine) and reasonTokenFor at lines 127-142 are no longer called from appendCompactItem (line 79 now calls appendCandidatesBlock instead). The reasonTokenFor 'why=' tokens are not surfaced in the new candidates block — confirm this is intentional per spec; if 'why' tokens should still appear (e.g., per-candidate), the new block is incomplete.

Optional: FeedbackConsoleServerTest:765 contains assertTrue(html.contains("'src? '")) checking the JS source string in served console assets — this still passes today only because app.js was not updated; once JS parity is fixed it will also need to change.
